Recovery: Poor

Reading: State
Poor
Recovery 46 • Sleep 68 • Strain 14%

Read
Recovery is muted despite a quieter-than-usual day, so the workout window opens with limited reserve rather than fresh capacity. For muscle retention, the main tension is a still-light protein base. Today favors disciplined resistance over intensity.

Measured strength.
